name: Classic Scrambled Eggs
description: Fluffy, creamy scrambled eggs made the classic way
instructions: Crack eggs into a bowl and whisk with milk, salt, and pepper
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium-low heat
Pour in egg mixture and let sit for 20 seconds
Gently push eggs from edges to center, folding gently
Remove from heat when still slightly wet - they will continue cooking

name: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy American-style pancakes perfect for weekend breakfasts
instructions: Mix flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a large bowl
Whisk milk, egg, and melted butter in another bowl
Pour wet ingredients into dry and stir until just combined (lumps are okay)
Heat a griddle or pan over medium heat and lightly grease
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake
Flip when bubbles form on surface and cook until golden
Serve with butter and maple syrup

name: Avocado Toast
description: Simple yet delicious avocado on toasted bread
instructions: Toast bread until golden and crispy
Cut avocado in half, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl
Mash with fork, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper
Spread mashed avocado on toast
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle red pepper flakes
Serve immediately

name: French Toast
description: Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside French toast
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, vanilla, and cinnamon in a shallow dish
Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat
Dip bread slices in egg mixture, coating both sides well
Cook until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side
Serve hot with maple syrup and fresh berries

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: Moist blueberry muffins perfect for breakfast or snacking
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F and line muffin tin with papers
Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a bowl
Combine milk, egg, and melted butter in another bowl
Pour wet into dry and stir until just combined
Gently fold in blueberries
Divide batter among muffin cups
Bake for 25 minutes until golden

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Classic Caesar salad with grilled chicken breast
instructions: Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper
Grill or pan-fry chicken for 6-7 minutes per side until cooked through
Let chicken rest for 5 minutes, then slice
Chop romaine lettuce and place in a large bowl
Make dressing: whisk olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, and parmesan
Toss lettuce with dressing
Top with sliced chicken and croutons
Serve immediately

name: BLT Sandwich
description: The classic bacon, lettuce, and tomato sandwich
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy, about 4 minutes per side
Toast bread slices
Spread mayonnaise on both slices of toast
Layer lettuce, tomato slices, and bacon on one slice
Top with second slice and serve

name: Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: Crispy, buttery grilled cheese sandwich
instructions: Butter one side of each bread slice
Place one slice butter-side down in a cold pan
Add cheese on top, then second bread slice butter-side up
Turn heat to medium-low
Cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side
Slice diagonally and serve hot

name: Veggie Wrap
description: Fresh and healthy vegetable wrap with hummus
instructions: Spread hummus evenly across the tortilla
Layer lettuce, sliced tomato, cucumber, bell pepper, and onion
Fold in the sides and roll tightly
Cut in half and serve

name: Tomato Soup
description: Creamy homemade tomato soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pot over medium heat
Sauté diced onion until soft, about 5 minutes
Add minced garlic and cook 1 minute
Add chopped tomatoes and vegetable stock
Simmer for 15 minutes
Blend until smooth with an immersion blender
Stir in heavy cream and fresh basil
Season with salt and pepper, serve hot

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Classic Italian pasta with rich meat sauce
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat
Brown ground beef, breaking it up as it cooks
Add diced onion, carrot, and celery, cook until soft
Add minced garlic, cook 1 minute
Pour in red wine and let it reduce by half
Add crushed tomatoes and tomato paste, stir well
Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes
Cook spaghetti according to package directions
Serve sauce over pasta, top with parmesan and basil

name: Grilled Chicken
description: Juicy grilled chicken breast with herbs
instructions: Whisk olive oil with lemon juice, minced garlic, salt, and pepper
Marinate chicken breasts in the mixture for at least 30 minutes
Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Grill chicken for 6-7 minutes per side
Internal temperature should reach 165°F
Let rest for 5 minutes before serving
Garnish with fresh rosemary and thyme

name: Beef Tacos
description: Seasoned ground beef tacos with fresh toppings
instructions: Brown ground beef in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add diced onion and cook until softened
Add minced garlic, cumin, and chili powder, cook 1 minute
Add a splash of water and simmer for 5 minutes
Warm taco shells according to package directions
Chop lettuce and dice tomatoes for toppings
Fill shells with beef, top with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and sour cream

name: Chicken Stir Fry
description: Quick and healthy chicken stir fry with vegetables
instructions: Slice chicken into thin strips and toss with cornstarch
Heat sesame oil in a wok over high heat
Stir-fry chicken until golden, about 3-4 minutes, set aside
Add more oil, stir-fry garlic and ginger for 30 seconds
Add carrots and broccoli, stir-fry for 2 minutes
Add bell pepper and snow peas, cook 2 more minutes
Return chicken to wok, add soy sauce
Toss everything together and serve over rice

name: Grilled Salmon
description: Simple grilled salmon with lemon and dill
instructions: Mix olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, dill, salt, and pepper
Marinate salmon fillets for 15-30 minutes
Preheat grill to medium-high heat
Grill salmon skin-side down for 4-5 minutes
Flip carefully and grill another 3-4 minutes
Salmon is done when it flakes easily with a fork
Serve with lemon wedges and extra dill

name: Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Italian risotto with mushrooms and parmesan
instructions: Heat chicken stock in a pot and keep warm
Sauté sliced mushrooms in butter until golden, set aside
In the same pan, sauté diced onion until soft
Add garlic and arborio rice, toast for 1-2 minutes
Pour in white wine and stir until absorbed
Add warm stock one ladle at a time, stirring constantly
Continue for about 18-20 minutes until rice is creamy
Stir in mushrooms, parmesan, and remaining butter
Season and serve immediately

name: Classic Burger
description: Juicy homemade beef burger with all the fixings
instructions: Divide ground beef into 4 portions and form into patties
Season patties with salt and pepper
Heat grill or pan to medium-high heat
Cook burgers 4-5 minutes per side for medium
Add cheese in the last minute to melt
Toast burger buns on the grill
Spread ketchup and mayo on buns
Layer lettuce, tomato, onion, pickle, and patty
Serve immediately

name: Vegetable Curry
description: Hearty vegetable curry with coconut milk
instructions: Cut cauliflower into florets and dice potatoes
Sauté diced onion until golden
Add minced garlic and ginger, cook 1 minute
Add curry powder and turmeric, toast for 30 seconds
Add potatoes and cauliflower, stir to coat
Pour in coconut milk and bring to simmer
Cook for 15 minutes until vegetables are tender
Stir in chickpeas and spinach
Cook until spinach wilts, serve over rice

name: Pork Chops with Apples
description: Pan-seared pork chops with caramelized apples
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper
Heat butter in a large oven-safe skillet
Sear pork chops 3-4 minutes per side until golden
Remove pork chops and set aside
Add sliced apples and onion to the pan
Cook until softened, about 5 minutes
Add brown sugar and sage, stir
Return pork chops to pan
Simmer for 5 minutes, serve hot

name: Shrimp Scampi
description: Garlic butter shrimp served over pasta
instructions: Cook pasta according to package directions
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes, cook 1 minute
Add shrimp, cook 2 minutes per side until pink
Pour in white wine and lemon juice
Toss in cooked pasta and parsley
Season with salt, serve immediately

name: Classic Guacamole
description: Fresh homemade guacamole with lime and cilantro
instructions: Cut avocados in half and remove pits
Scoop flesh into a bowl and mash with a fork
Add lime juice immediately to prevent browning
Dice onion, tomato, and jalapeño finely
Mix in vegetables, cilantro, minced garlic, and salt
Taste and adjust seasoning
Serve immediately with tortilla chips

name: Hummus
description: Smooth Middle Eastern chickpea dip
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas
Add chickpeas to food processor with tahini
Blend until smooth, scraping sides as needed
Add lemon juice, garlic, cumin, and salt
With processor running, drizzle in olive oil
Add water if needed for desired consistency
Taste and adjust seasoning
Drizzle with olive oil and serve with pita

name: Bruschetta
description: Italian tomato and basil on toasted bread
instructions: Dice tomatoes and place in a bowl
Add minced garlic, chopped basil, olive oil, and vinegar
Season with salt and let marinate for 15 minutes
Slice baguette and brush with olive oil
Toast until golden, about 2-3 minutes
Rub toast with cut garlic clove
Top with tomato mixture and serve

name: Fruit Smoothie
description: Refreshing mixed berry smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender
Blend until smooth
Add more milk if too thick
Pour into glasses and serve immediately

name: Deviled Eggs
description: Classic deviled eggs with tangy filling
instructions: Place eggs in a single layer in a pot, cover with cold water
Bring to a boil, then turn off heat and cover for 12 minutes
Transfer eggs to ice bath for 5 minutes
Peel eggs and slice in half lengthwise
Remove yolks and place in a bowl
Mash yolks with mayo, mustard, vinegar, and salt
Pipe or spoon filling back into egg whites
Sprinkle with paprika and serve

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Classic homemade chocolate chip cookies
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F
Cream butter and sugars until light and fluffy
Beat in eggs one at a time, then add vanilla
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in separate bowl
Gradually add dry ingredients to wet mixture
Fold in chocolate chips
Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased baking sheets
Bake 9-12 minutes until golden brown
Cool on baking sheet for 2 minutes, then transfer to rack

name: Chocolate Cake
description: Rich and moist chocolate cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F, grease and flour two 9-inch round pans
Mix flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, and baking soda in a large bowl
Add eggs, milk, melted butter, and vanilla, beat for 2 minutes
Stir in hot water (batter will be thin)
Pour into prepared pans
Bake 30-35 minutes
Cool in pans 10 minutes, then remove to wire racks
Frost with your favorite frosting
